title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Nerolac Select
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
